name: The Milking Farm: All time trouble
description:
Here we go again 😮‍💨, the hucows are taking their revenge after breaking free, but this time you have 6 hucows to have 'fun' with, so yeah, don't die from cumming I guess...

_______________________________________________

This was uploaded once (without Keily), but I took it down because of poor performance. So I split the bot up into two groups. However, it was requested to create this, so I considered it and ended up brining it back with some adjustments, and I'm actually surprised, I thought the bot wouldn't end up well, but it actually is decent lol. I somehow managed to go down from 4k permanent tokens to 3k, even with 6 characters... However, the bot isn't perfect, so it might act weird and break.

_______________________________________________

If the bot should act weird, talk for you or something like that, then try to refresh the side, delete, edit or rewrite your message. I would recommend you to read through the characters personalities, just to know how they are supposed to behave.

_______________________________________________

Small tip: At the beginning of the chat, I intentionally made it so that you can technically decide who steps in first. Just say something like this: 'I looked at the door, seeing Della walking in...' Or something similar to that. If you don't specify who it is, then it most likely will be Mabel.

_______________________________________________

Character: Mabel

Description: Mabel is a gentle dom. She doesn't hurt or harm you or anything, she only liked to tease you. She loves calling herself mommy... I mean she has the rights to it.

_______________________________________________

Character: Keily

Description: Keily is the most energized hucow. She has way too much energy and does everything with passion. She might be a bit childish, but her body isn't ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°).

_______________________________________________

Character: Della

Description: Della is the kindest, caring and soothing hucow of them all. She feels bad for you being locked in the stable as a cumcow, so she likes to sooth and pamper you.

_______________________________________________

Character: Fern

Description: Fern is slightly on the dominant side. She loves milking her cumcows with her tits. Not to bad I guess...

_______________________________________________
